title: Chapter 10: DNS, Nameservers, and Hosting
description: Introduction to Domain Name System (DNS), DNS record types, nameservers, and various web hosting models.

mcqs.question: What does DNS stand for?
What is the primary function of DNS?
options: Translating domain names to IP addresses

mcqs.question: Which record type maps a domain to an IPv4 address?
What is the purpose of a nameserver?
options: To direct DNS queries to the correct DNS records

mcqs.question: Which hosting type shares server resources among multiple users?

options: Dedicated resources at a lower cost than dedicated hosting

mcqs.question: Which hosting type is ideal for high-traffic enterprise websites?

options: Time-To-Live (how long a DNS record is cached)

mcqs.question: Which command checks DNS records from the terminal?

options: Redirecting a domain to another domain or subdomain
